imaging_request.indication_text: Surveillance CT chest following left lower lobectomy for stage II NSCLC. Patient was seen by oncology; adjuvant therapy was discussed but decision is pending.

clinical_indication.diagnosis_text: Malignant neoplasm of lower lobe, left lung
clinical_indication.supporting_notes: Post-resection follow-up. Lobectomy performed 2025 — exact date not recorded in this submission. Clinical staging T2aN1M0. Pathologic staging not included. Adjuvant therapy discussed with oncologist; no medication initiated as of submission date.
